# jellyfin_api_key (Data Source)

Looks up a Jellyfin API key by app name. The lookup fails if multiple keys share the same name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "jellyfin_api_key" "ci" {
  app_name = "ci-pipeline"
}

output "ci_token" {
  value     = data.jellyfin_api_key.ci.access_token
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app_name` (String) The application name of the API key.

### Read-Only

- `access_token` (String, Sensitive) The API key access token.
- `date_created` (String) The date the API key was created.
